TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == bihkac == u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam śćēÁćłŚô® u sulit nu Lipun ÁĹ† „Āĺ„Āü„ĀĮ„Éą„É©„ÉÉ„Éó u sulit nu Amilka Animal trapping, or simply trapping u siwkay nu bihkac- sakapaluwaluway u bihkac sa ,u sapiadup tu aadupen nu miadupay. sangaen nu muking, tusa ku sicekaay, buhatay ku sicekay patizeng i zazan nu aadupen. anu mazipa ku aadupen sa, amatahap ku sicekaay, mahiza ku ngipen, makalad, makelem nu bihkac. mazikeptu ku aadupan a kuku'. saicelang ku bihekac. pacekan i lala sanay, caykalimad. u canan a aadupen ku mazikep uyniay a bihkac, maala ku caket, sizi,kiyuma,ngabul, caykaala ku tumay, tatabaki ku tumay. u canan a cidekay matineng misanga atu miadup u miadupay a ingcumin, matinengtu sapibihekac, matinengtu misanga. ayzasa caytu misanga ku miadupay, cakayhan i tishiba, izawtu ku pacakayay. u zuma a bihkac nu Sakizaya izawtu ku sapitekelay a bihekac, caykaw nu mukingay a bihkac, u auk atu kilang. caykaw icelang ku ayam atu tulakuk, u auk atu kilangay a bihkac, tanengtu mazikep tu ayam atu tulakuk.
S.PHON: == bińßka ¶ == u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam *** u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun * ******* u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺka animar~…ĺ trappiŇč, or simpr~…ĺj trappiŇč u siwkaj nu bińßka ¶- sakapar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwaj u bińßka ¶ sa ,u sapiadup tu aadup…ôn nu miadupaj. saŇča…ôn nu mukiŇč, tusa ku si ¶…ôkaaj, buńßataj ku si ¶…ôkaj patiz…ôŇč i zazan nu aadup…ôn. anu mazipa ku aadup…ôn sa, amatańßap ku si ¶…ôkaaj, mańßiza ku Ňčip…ôn, makar~…ĺad, mak…ôr~…ĺ…ôm nu bińßka ¶. mazik…ôptu ku aadupan a kuku Ē~ °. sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku bińß…ôka ¶. pa ¶…ôkan i r~…ĺar~…ĺa sanaj, ¶ajkar~…ĺimad. u ¶anan a aadup…ôn ku mazik…ôp ujniaj a bińßka ¶, maar~…ĺa ku ¶ak…ôt, sizi,kijuma,Ňčabur~…ĺ, ¶ajkaar~…ĺa ku tumaj, tatabaki ku tumaj. u ¶anan a ¶id…ôkaj matin…ôŇč misaŇča atu miadup u miadupaj a iŇč ¶umin, matin…ôŇčtu sapibińß…ôka ¶, matin…ôŇčtu misaŇča. ajzasa ¶ajtu misaŇča ku miadupaj, ¶akajńßan i tisńßiba, izawtu ku pa ¶akajaj. u zuma a bińßka ¶ nu sakizaja izawtu ku sapit…ôk…ôr~…ĺaj a bińß…ôka ¶, ¶ajkaw nu mukiŇčaj a bińßka ¶, u auk atu kir~…ĺaŇč. ¶ajkaw i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku ajam atu tur~…ĺakuk, u auk atu kir~…ĺaŇčaj a bińßka ¶, tan…ôŇčtu mazik…ôp tu ajam atu tur~…ĺakuk.
S.FORM: == bihkac == u sulit nu zuma a kamu u sulit nu Hulam śćēÁćłŚô® u sulit nu Lipun ÁĹ† „Āĺ„Āü„ĀĮ„Éą„É©„ÉÉ„Éó u sulit nu Amilka Animal trapping, or simply trapping u siwkay nu bihkac- sakapaluwaluway u bihkac sa ,u sapiadup tu aadupen nu miadupay. sangaen nu muking, tusa ku sicekaay, buhatay ku sicekay patizeng i zazan nu aadupen. anu mazipa ku aadupen sa, amatahap ku sicekaay, mahiza ku ngipen, makalad, makelem nu bihkac. mazikeptu ku aadupan a kuku'. saicelang ku bihekac. pacekan i lala sanay, caykalimad. u canan a aadupen ku mazikep uyniay a bihkac, maala ku caket, sizi,kiyuma,ngabul, caykaala ku tumay, tatabaki ku tumay. u canan a cidekay matineng misanga atu miadup u miadupay a ingcumin, matinengtu sapibihekac, matinengtu misanga. ayzasa caytu misanga ku miadupay, cakayhan i tishiba, izawtu ku pacakayay. u zuma a bihkac nu Sakizaya izawtu ku sapitekelay a bihekac, caykaw nu mukingay a bihkac, u auk atu kilang. caykaw icelang ku ayam atu tulakuk, u auk atu kilangay a bihkac, tanengtu mazikep tu ayam atu tulakuk.
S.PHON: == bińßka ¶ == u sur~…ĺit nu zuma a kamu u sur~…ĺit nu ńßur~…ĺam *** u sur~…ĺit nu r~…ĺipun * ******* u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺka animar~…ĺ trappiŇč, or simpr~…ĺj trappiŇč u siwkaj nu bińßka ¶- sakapar~…ĺuwar~…ĺuwaj u bińßka ¶ sa ,u sapiadup tu aadup…ôn nu miadupaj. saŇča…ôn nu mukiŇč, tusa ku si ¶…ôkaaj, buńßataj ku si ¶…ôkaj patiz…ôŇč i zazan nu aadup…ôn. anu mazipa ku aadup…ôn sa, amatańßap ku si ¶…ôkaaj, mańßiza ku Ňčip…ôn, makar~…ĺad, mak…ôr~…ĺ…ôm nu bińßka ¶. mazik…ôptu ku aadupan a kuku Ē~ °. sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku bińß…ôka ¶. pa ¶…ôkan i r~…ĺar~…ĺa sanaj, ¶ajkar~…ĺimad. u ¶anan a aadup…ôn ku mazik…ôp ujniaj a bińßka ¶, maar~…ĺa ku ¶ak…ôt, sizi,kijuma,Ňčabur~…ĺ, ¶ajkaar~…ĺa ku tumaj, tatabaki ku tumaj. u ¶anan a ¶id…ôkaj matin…ôŇč misaŇča atu miadup u miadupaj a iŇč ¶umin, matin…ôŇčtu sapibińß…ôka ¶, matin…ôŇčtu misaŇča. ajzasa ¶ajtu misaŇča ku miadupaj, ¶akajńßan i tisńßiba, izawtu ku pa ¶akajaj. u zuma a bińßka ¶ nu sakizaja izawtu ku sapit…ôk…ôr~…ĺaj a bińß…ôka ¶, ¶ajkaw nu mukiŇčaj a bińßka ¶, u auk atu kir~…ĺaŇč. ¶ajkaw i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku ajam atu tur~…ĺakuk, u auk atu kir~…ĺaŇčaj a bińßka ¶, tan…ôŇčtu mazik…ôp tu ajam atu tur~…ĺakuk.
